nasb.text: and the priest shall look at him on the seventh day. If it spreads farther in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is an infection of leprosy.

esv.text: and the priest shall examine him the seventh day. If it is spreading in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is a case of leprous disease.

cnv.text: 到了第七天，祭司要察看；火斑若是在皮上蔓延，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨，這是痲風病。

ccb.text: 第七天，祭司要再次检查，若发现患处扩散，就要宣布他是不洁净的，因为他患了麻风病。
